rulings.Case Title: SHEILA TSANG VS. TRAN-LIEU, JUDY A/K/A XOANG TRAN-LIEU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion Seeking Order Entering Judgment Pursuant To A Stip
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 15, 2013, line 6. PLAINTIFF SHEILA TSANG's Motion Seeking Order Entering Judgment Pursuant To A Stipulation DENIED. Defendant's breach of stipulation was caused by exigent circumstances. Plaintiff's argument, unsupported by evidence, that ulcer is not a medical condition requiring immediate attention, does not overcome this finding. = (501/REQ)
